title: Peppery Juicy Croatian Farfalle Pasta
description: A vibrant, pepper-forward pasta dish packed with roasted tomatoes and garlic, perfect for a soothing meal when youre feeling under the weather.

ingredients.name: farfalle pasta (low-carb)
ingredients.notes: use shirataki or coconut‑based pasta to keep carbs low

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat.
Add the sliced chicken and season with salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and oregano; cook for 5–6 minutes until lightly browned and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the minced garlic and sliced bell pepper; sauté for 2 minutes until fragrant and peppers start to soften.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes and cook for another 3–4 minutes until they burst and release juices.
Return the chicken to the skillet, pour in the chicken broth and tomato purée, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook for 5 minutes so flavors meld.
Meanwhile, cook the farfalle pasta according to the package instructions until al dente; drain and reserve a little pasta water.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing to coat with the tomato‑pepper sauce; add a splash of reserved pasta water if needed to loosen the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley. Enjoy a comforting, peppery dish that’s gentle on the stomach.
